data.description: Next.js dashboard featuring real-time 'Agent Heartbeat', security posture delta timeline, and full decision trail per finding.

Performs deep repository reconnaissance using GitHub GraphQL and Tree-sitter AST. Identifies High Value Targets (HVTs) like auth controllers and crypto modules. Stores metadata in an isolated PostgreSQL instance.
Detects hardcoded secrets using Shannon entropy (>4.5), regex patterns, and a 2-of-3 signal rule. Includes false positive suppression and masking. (FR-201 to FR-205)
Manages security memory using Qdrant vector storage with a 0.85 cosine threshold. Tracks NEW/PERSISTENT/RESOLVED/REGRESSION lifecycle. (FR-401 to FR-405)
Filters hallucinations using Enkrypt AI, verifies code snippets against source, and validates evidence against Zod schemas. (FR-501 to FR-503)
Synthesizes final reports, calculates 0-100 Security Posture Score, generates 3-sentence executive summaries, and streams via WebSocket. (FR-601 to FR-604)
Security guardrail layer. Performs output toxicity/bias checks and CVE ID verification to prevent LLM hallucinations.
Distributed cache for GitHub API rate-limit management and workflow state caching.
Centralized logging and tracing. Tracks unique trace_id across all Mastra steps to provide a full decision trail for every finding.
Relational database storing encrypted GitHub PATs (AES-256-GCM) and scan metadata.
Performs taint-flow analysis (source-to-sink), GHSA CVE lookups, CWE assignment, and CVSS v4.0 scoring using Tree-sitter AST. (FR-301 to FR-305)
Enforces GitHub API rate limits and manages LLM token quotas to prevent service exhaustion and cost overruns.
Anonymizes PII and sensitive code patterns before sending data to external LLM providers to ensure compliance.
GitHub Advisory Database for CVE lookups and vulnerability intelligence.
Asynchronous message queue for decoupled agent communication and task distribution.
Isolated metadata store for RepoScannerAgent.
Isolated findings store for SecretDetectorAgent.
Isolated findings store for VulnAnalyzerAgent.
Isolated storage for generated security reports.
Stores core data
Automated CI/CD pipeline that enforces Zod schema compliance and validates mathematical confidence models against PRD specifications.
